mismatch_triage.justification: The assumptions are different but not incompatible. Both models can be integrated with a clear understanding of their respective assumptions.
The descriptions are different but not incompatible. Both models can be integrated with a clear understanding of their respective descriptions.
The model versions are the same, so it is not a mismatch.
The purposes and patterns are different but not incompatible. Both models can be integrated with a clear understanding of their respective purposes and patterns.
The titles are different but not incompatible. Both models can be integrated with a clear understanding of their respective titles.
The temporal coverage is incompatible, which could block integration.

mismatches.root_cause: Incompatible temporal coverage between Model A and Model B.
mismatches.why_it_blocks_integration: The temporal coverage of Model A and Model B are not aligned, which could lead to inconsistencies in the integrated model.
mismatches.proposed_fix: Resample Model A to match the temporal coverage of Model B or vice versa.

rules: Resample Model A data to match the temporal coverage of Model B.
data_transform.example: If Model A data is in days, resample it to multi-year or decadal intervals to match Model B.

steps: Identify the temporal coverage of Model A and Model B.
Resample Model A data to match the temporal coverage of Model B.
Integrate the resampled data from Model A with Model B.

validation: Verify that the resampled data from Model A matches the temporal coverage of Model B.
Ensure that the integrated model produces consistent results with the resampled data.
